_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: A comparable difference in migration could be observed between control-transfected and Nf2-transfected TC620 cells (25.2 ± 2.1% TC620 vs. 17.8 ± 2.5% TC620)...This difference was most prominent in TC620 cells (40% reduction)
details: NF2 overexpression reduced scratch closure from 25.2±2.1% to 17.8±2.5% and caused 40% reduction in cell path length over 30 hours
